description: Execute a SELECT query on an attached Altertable database and return the results as a DuckDB table.
example: SELECT * FROM altertable_query('db', 'SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE active = true');

description: Execute a remote DDL or DML statement on an attached Altertable database.
example: CALL altertable_execute('db', 'CREATE TABLE my_table (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR)');
